name: TapeTech EasyClean Automatic Taper 07TT
full_description: TapeTech 07TT EasyClean® Taper is the most advanced and enhanced drywall taping tool offered by TapeTech. EasyClean® lid releases with a quick turn of the single attachment screw, and makes clean-up and cable changes easier than ever. You can expect great TapeTech quality from the rest of the drywall gun as well! EASY GRIP CONTROL TUBE . The control tube has been lengthened 2.5" and glide wheels added to make tape cuts easier and more comfortable. The glide wheels are recessed into flanges at each end of the control tube, and act as stops for your hands - requiring much less grip-force to operate the cutter. QUICK-CHANGE TAPE BAIL locks into place, making it easy to change tape rolls without having to put the taper down. Best of all, there are no loose parts to misplace or re-install. To change tape rolls, grasp the tape retainer wire near the end of the spool post and depress it down and out through the retainer slot. Swing the retainer wire up and out of the way, change tape rolls, sliding the new roll fully onto the spool post. Swing the retainer wire back down, and guide it into the retainer slot. It’s that simple! NO HASSLE CABLE CHANGES. The plunger stop has been improved to simplify cable changes. The metal and exposed screw heads have been replaced with a smooth, rounded, plastic plunger stop that is easy to remove and re-install. To remove the plunger stop, lift the locking tab and twist the stop ¼ turn counterclockwise. After twisting, pull the stop off the taper and complete the cable change following the normal procedure (see Cable Replacement). To re-install, align the guide tabs to the slots and slide the stop into the taper end, twisting ¼ turn clockwise. Continue twisting until the tab snaps into place, locking the assembly together. If oriented correctly, very little force should be required to install the stop. Changing a cable has never been easier! NOW WITH ADJUSTABLE BRAKING SYSTEM! This new feature allows you to adjust the braking system for your personal preference. Now you have the control over the brake. It also can be adjusted tighter or looser to account for wear on your taper.

name: TapeTech Corner Roller with Handle TT15E
full_description: TapeTech 15TTE Corner Roller with FHTT Interchangeable Fiberglass Handle is the newest version standard angle roller. The 15TTE Corner Roller head incorporates several new design elements that make it easier to clean and operate. The wheels are a departure from the old reversible steel wheels - Replaced with stainless steel roller wheels filled with plastic. The new design washes easier, keeps mud from caking up the wheels, and eliminates stuck wheels. The wheels are attached with a stud design that inhibits wear, and eases friction. Combine the Roller with TapeTech's new FHTT D-Shaped Interchangeable 43" Fiberglass Handle, and you're covered from floor to ceiling. The corner roller drywall tool is used to embed drywall paper tape firmly into the corner in preparation for use with a corner finisher angle head. All TapeTech tools come with an industry-best 5-year limited warranty. Additionally, the tools can be serviced through All-Wall with 2 authorized warranty and repair locations. For over 25 years, TapeTech has served the needs of the drywall industry, producing tools of uncompromising quality, durability and performance. TapeTech’s engineers are continuously designing new tools and improving existing tools to make the job of the finishing professional easier. TapeTech Corner Roller with FHTT Handle Features: Steel Rollers with Plastic Interior provides smooth operation, and are easy to clean Lightweight and fast tool to bed the tape into inside corners forming a sharp corner at the same time. Can embed tape in 10-foot high (3m) corners while standing on the floor. Includes TapeTech FHTT Interchangeable 43" Fiberglass Handle Handle diameter of 1.25" is larger and more comfortable than previous versions D-Shaped FHTT handle fits the TapeTech Angle Boxes, Nail Spotters and Corner Finishers with available adapters

name: TapeTech Wizard Compact Flat Box Handle 8000TT-PA
full_description: TapeTech Wizard Compact Flat Box Handle 8000TT-PA for Power Assist Boxes BIGGER ISN'T ALWAYS BETTER! ! The New Wizard™ Compact Flat Box Handle lets you take your flat box places it has never been. This model is specially designed for use with TapeTech Power Assist flat boxes. The compact size of the Wizard™ allows you to use your box in tight spaces like closets or under stairs. The Wizard™ gives you unmatched control by placing your hand directly over the pressure plate. The extra leverage gives you more power with less force and is much safer when working on scaffolding. This handle is angled to give you the extra clearance needed on the power assist boxes. This revolutionary design has the ability to reverse the front handle, allowing for multiple hand positions, which reduces worker fatigue. The lack of a brake handle on the Wizard™ means even an unexperienced finisher can learn quickly. Features: Compact size (10.5") fits where other handles can't, making closets and tight spots no problem. Specially angled to fit on TapeTech Power Assist Flat Boxes Unmatched control and leverage, achieved by placing your hand directly over the pressure plate. Improved ergonomics, including the reversible handle to reduce fatigue.

name: TapeTech 2.5" Direct Flusher CF25TT
full_description: TapeTech 2.5" Corner Flusher can quickly glaze or finish inside corners. TapeTech CF25TT flusher can be used as either a direct or indirect flusher. Indirect flushers are used to smooth compound that has been applied by another tool. Direct flushers can be used to apply joint compound to internal corners. You can simply choose the size flusher to suit your needs without worrying which style to order. The Corner Flushers fit all standard angle boxes, corner boxes, angle head handles or Mudrunner. TapeTech corner flusher can be used as either an indirect flusher for skimming over compound applied with applicator or by attaching to angle box, corner box or Mudrunner to apply final finish coat over inside drywall corner angles. Durable ultra-light weight skids offer long, reliable service and optional wheels can be mounted for super smooth finishing. Stainless steel body Optional roller wheels available Ultra light, durable skids for smooth operation and long life Can be used as either indirect or direct flusher

name: TapeTech 2.5" Angle Head 42TT
full_description: TapeTech 2.5" Angle Head Used to perfectly feather both sides of internal drywall tape corners in one pass. The corner finisher, also known as corner finisher, angle finisher, or glazer, is attached to a corner applicator, angle box, MudRunner® or angle head handle to quickly and professionally finish internal drywall corners. An angle head can be used for any 90º inside drywall corner, at either wall or ceiling junctions, and embeds inside angle tape on walls and ceilings by smoothly feathering excess mud in internal corners. TapeTech Corner Finishers are spring loaded to help compensate for slight corner imperfections. The TapeTech 2.5" corner finisher angle head is ideal for tape coats and for finishing drywall projects with narrow door legs or window trim areas. Stainless steel frames provide many years of reliable service and positive ball retainer keeps angle head securely attached to angle box, Mudrunner or angle head handle, eliminating surprise disconnects or tool damage. Locking Clip Retainer Eliminates Damaging Disconnects. Perfect For Glazing Tape Coat Narrow Side Legs Welded Steel Frames Durable Nickel-Plating Die-cast aluminum body resists corrosion

name: TapeTech 7" Power Assist MAXXBOX PAHC07
full_description: TapeTech 7" POWER ASSIST® MAXXBOX® PAHC07 Gives you the extra capacity you want in a high capacity Flat Box, with half the effort. Save time and reduce fatigue by letting the tool do more of the work. Featuring a smart design that matches the usable capacity to the application. The TapeTech Power Assist® finishing box holds just the right amount of joint compound to keep you finishing longer without wearing you out. The POWER ASSIST® MAXXBOX® is sure to become the industry standard for finishing! Adjustable dial crown setting allows the user to easily apply just the right amount of compound over flat seams and butt joints on walls and ceilings. These boxes work with all major brand flat box handles, including the Wizard™ handle for Power Assist® boxes 8000TT-PA (not included). Flat box brake handle controls position of MAXXBOX® to activate the POWER ASSIST® mechanism. Pressure plate reverse spring setup then helps apply the joint compound. MAXXBOX® high capacity holds more mud compound, saving you trips back and forth to the the pump for refills, increasing your production ability. Perfect For Base Coats on Flat Seams, Butt Joints and Cornerbeads Pivoting Axle Adjusts To Any Drywall Surface Adjustable Crown Control For Correct Compound Output Designed To Improve Speed and Efficiency Reverse Springs For Power Assisted Finishing EasyClean Pressure Plate For Fast Cleanup High Mud Compound Capacity

name: TapeTech 6.5" QuickBox QSX Finishing Box
full_description: TapeTech QuickBox QSX 6.5" Finishing Box QuickBox™ QSX - is the first finishing box specifically designed to be used with fast-setting joint compounds (hot mud). Combine the speed of same day multi-coat hot mud with ATF flat box consistent finish! The 6 ½” QuickBox™ QSX is the perfect tool for drywallers who prefer to use fast-setting joint compound when embedding the joint tape. The QuickBox™ QSX works with paper tape, fiberglass tape or the new fiber joint tapes. The QuickBox™ QSX can be used for a wide variety of applications - Tape Embed, Nail Spot, Flex Trim Coating, Tight Area, Short Runs, and more. Constructed from advanced space age materials, fast-setting joint compound is easily removed from the finishing box, even hours or days later. The compound literally falls out of the QuickBox™ QSX with a few light taps. QuickBox™ QSX features: A glass-filled polypropylene shell that provides a slick surface with maximum strength and durability. Large wheels to roll easily over any type of gypsum panels Pressure plate that opens completely for easy filling and cleaning. The box can be filled easily with the pump, the compound tube or by hand An optimized blade design that matches the blade with the application, eliminating the need to make adjustments or change crown settings. Tool-free design for ultra-fast blade changes. Works with all TapeTech and major brand finishing box handles, including the Wizard®. Includes two blades (QB6003 standard and QB6023 crown)

name: TapeTech 7" EasyClean Flat Box EZ07TT
full_description: TapeTech 7" EasyClean™ Flat Box EZ07TT The rigid design allows the flat box to apply just the right amount of drywall joint compound, feathering both edges at the same time. The main extrusion strongly supports side plates for greater strength. Ideal for applying base coat to drywall flat seams, butt joints or corner beads, These boxes will also fit all major brands of flat box handles. The EasyRoll™ wheel system allows you to expertly finish all types of outside corner bead up to two times faster than finishing by hand. EasyRoll™ wheels work with all types of outside corner bead including metal, paper-faced, vinyl and bullnose. These wheels provide a shoulder to guide the finishing box along the corner bead without after-market attachments or damage to the axle. The shoulder of the EasyRoll™ wheels are more than three times wider than after-market products, making it easier to place, and keep the finishing box on the corner bead. EasyRoll™ wheels are engineered and designed to be perfectly aligned with the finishing blade, eliminating the need to tilt the finishing box like you must with common after-market wheel systems. Perfect For Base Coats On Flat Seams and Corner Bead. Coat Corner Bead With EZ Roll Wheels Quick Release Thumb Latches For Easy Cleanup Rigid Shell Design Easy Blade Carrier Dial Adjustment For Precision Fits All Major Brand Drywall Flat Box Handles 5-Year Manufacturer's Warranty.

name: TapeTech Interchangeable Fiberglass Support Handle FHTT
full_description: TapeTech Interchangeable Fiberglass Support Handle FHTT An interchangeable handle system that allows one support handle to be used with Corner Rollers, Angle Boxes, Angle Heads, and Nail Spotters! The base handle FHTT fits the corner roller without adapters, as well as the new design corner applicator and nail spotter without adapters. The new, optimal 1.25" diameter makes TapeTech FHTT handles the most ergonomic in the industry. The FHTT features a D-shaped fitting that securely positions the handle in the Corner Applicator and positively prevents the tool from rotating during use. Features: Single Handle With Attachments For A Variety Of Tools D-Shaped Fitting Eliminates Corner Box Movement Comfortable and Ergonomic Lightweight Only 1.15lbs 43" Overall Length 1.25" Diameter Handle Fitments and Adapters: The Corner Applicator Adapter (CAA-TT) The Nail Spotter Adapter (NSA-TT) Corner Finisher/ Angle Head Adapter (CFA-TT) Corner Applicator/ Angle Box Handle Adapter (CAA-TT) Note: If you use your current Nail Spotters with the new handle system you will need to mount the handle in the back holes of the tabs on the Nail Spotter. If you have the current 63TT or 68TT Nail Spotters, you need the FHTT or the XHTT plus the NSA-TT adapter. If you have the current 35TT or 50TT Corner Applicators, you need the FHTT or the XHTT plus the CAA-TT adapter.

name: TapeTech 2" EasyClean Nail Spotter NS02TT
full_description: TapeTech 2" EasyClean® Nail Spotter NS02TT Allows you to spot ceilings without the use of stilts faster and more efficient than spotting nails by hand. Featuring the EasyClean® Lid, quick release latch, and gasket system (similar to a flat box). This allows easy access and hassle-free clean up. This Nail Spotter gives you the flexibility for any size job, and is an ideal single spotter system. The traditional style skid plate is both a pivot point and a screw detector, which helps prevent blade damage. The spotter body is made of high quality stainless steel that will not rust or deteriorate. Each TapeTech Nail Spotter includes a Nail Spotter Adapter NSA-TT which attaches to both Interchangeable Fiberglass Handle FHTT (not included) and Interchangeable Extendable Handle XHTT (not included). name: TapeTech XL EasyClean Loading Pump 76XLTT
full_description: TapeTech Extra Long EasyClean Loading Pump - 76XLTT Designed to fit these 30 gallon barrels perfectly. This loading pump distributes more mud with less pumps, filling your tools in half the time, saving you time and improving productivity. This pump allows you to fill your tools standing up, no more bending over. Features Longer tube holds more mud, to fill your tools in half the time. Fill your tools standing up - no more bending over. Pump from larger 30 gallon containers. Detachable tube, handle and foot valve makes clean-up easy.

name: TapeTech XL Gooseneck for 76XLTT Pump
full_description: TapeTech Extra Long Gooseneck for 76XLTT Pump

name: TapeTech Compound Tube Filler Adapter CTA01TT
full_description: TapeTech Compound Tube Filler Adapter CTA01TT Designed to fit any size Compound Tube, as an alternative to using a Loading Pump, when filling Flat Boxes. The quick-release latches on the TapeTech Compound Tubes make removing the outlet assembly, and inserting the Filler Adapter CTA01TT, a quick and easy exchange. Easy clean up and durable design, the Compound Tube Filler Adapter provides great flexablity for any drywall professional.

name: TapeTech Automatic Taper Extension ATX01TT
full_description: TapeTech Automatic Taper Extension for 07TT Taper The TapeTech Automatic Taper Extension adds an extra 30" or (76cm) to the TapeTech 07TT EasyClean® Automatic Taper. This Automatic Taper Extension quickly converts your standard TapeTech taper, without the use of additional tools or equipment, allowing you to reach higher joints. This extension provides its own control tube for advancing and cutting as well as an independent creaser wheel control lever. Reach higher with the TapeTech Automatic Taper Extension for the 07TT taper. *Note – This product is NOT compatible with the 07TT-C EasyClean® Carbon Fiber Automatic Taper.

name: TapeTech 15" EasyClean Flat Box EZ15TT
full_description: TapeTech 15" EasyClean™ Flat Box EZ15TT The largest Flat Box on the market! The 15" rigid design easily applies the right amount of drywall joint compound while feathering both edges at the same time. The main extrusion strongly supports side plates for greater strength. Perfect for applying a wide finish coat to drywall flat seams or butt joints, these boxes will also fit all major brands of flat box handles. The EasyRoll™ wheel system allows you to expertly finish all types of outside corner bead up to two times faster than finishing by hand. EasyRoll™ wheels work with all types of outside corner bead including metal, paper-faced, vinyl and bullnose. These wheels provide a shoulder to guide the finishing box along the corner bead without after-market attachments or damage to the axle. The shoulder of the EasyRoll™ wheels are more than three times wider than after-market products, making it easier to place, and keep the finishing box on the corner bead. EasyRoll™ wheels are engineered and designed to be perfectly aligned with the finishing blade, eliminating the need to tilt the finishing box like you must with common after-market wheel systems. A Wider Base For Better Results Perfect For Wide Finish Coats On Flat Seams and Butt Joints. Coat Corner Bead With EZ Roll Wheels Quick Release Thumb Latches For Easy Cleanup Rigid Shell Design Easy Blade Carrier Dial Adjustment For Precision Fits All Major Brand Drywall Flat Box Handles 5-Year Manufacturer's Warranty.

name: TapeTech 8" QuickBox QSX Finishing Box
full_description: TapeTech QuickBox QSX 8" Finishing Box The first finishing box specifically designed to be used with fast-setting joint compounds (hot mud). Combine the speed of same day multi-coat hot mud with ATF flat box consistent finish! The 8” QuickBox™ QSX is the perfect tool for drywallers who prefer to use fast-setting joint compound when embedding the joint tape. The QuickBox™ QSX works with paper tape, fiberglass tape or the new fiber joint tapes. The QuickBox™ QSX can be used for a wide variety of applications - Tape Embed, Nail Spot, Flex Trim Coating, Tight Area, Short Runs, and more. Constructed from advanced space age materials, fast-setting joint compound is easily removed from the finishing box, even hours or days later. The compound literally falls out of the QuickBox™ QSX with a few light taps. QuickBox™ QSX features: A glass-filled polypropylene shell that provides a slick surface with maximum strength and durability. Large wheels to roll easily over any type of gypsum panels Pressure plate that opens completely for easy filling and cleaning. The box can be filled easily with the pump, the compound tube or by hand An optimized blade design that matches the blade with the application, eliminating the need to make adjustments or change crown settings. Tool-free design for ultra-fast blade changes. Works with all TapeTech and major brand finishing box handles, including the Wizard®. Includes two blades

name: TapeTech Carbon Fiber Automatic Taper 07TT-C
full_description: TapeTech Carbon Fiber EasyClean® Automatic Taper The Lightest TapeTech Taper Ever! TapeTech is excited to introduce the new 07TT-C Carbon Fiber Automatic Taper. At just 5.65 pounds, the 07TT-C is up to 20% lighter than standard tapers, which helps in reducing worker fatigue. The main tube and the control tube are carbon fiber, a material that will not dent and is temperature-neutral. No more cold tubes in the winter or hot tubes in the summer! Features Include: Easy Grip Control Tube. The control tube has been lengthened 2.5" and glide wheels added to make tape cuts easier and more comfortable. The glide wheels are recessed into flanges at each end of the control tube, and act as stops for your hands - requiring much less grip-force to operate the cutter. Quick-Change Tape Bail Locks into place, making it easy to change tape rolls without having to put the taper down. Best of all, there are no loose parts to misplace or re-install. To change tape rolls, grasp the tape retainer wire near the end of the spool post and depress it down and out through the retainer slot. Swing the retainer wire up and out of the way, change tape rolls, sliding the new roll fully onto the spool post. Swing the retainer wire back down, and guide it into the retainer slot. It’s that simple! No Hassle Cable Changes. The plunger stop has been improved to simplify cable changes. The metal and exposed screw heads have been replaced with a smooth, rounded, plastic plunger stop that is easy to remove and re-install. To remove the plunger stop, lift the locking tab and twist the stop ¼ turn counterclockwise. After twisting, pull the stop off the taper and complete the cable change following the normal procedure (see Cable Replacement). To re-install, align the guide tabs to the slots and slide the stop into the taper end, twisting ¼ turn clockwise. Continue twisting until the tab snaps into place, locking the assembly together. If oriented correctly, very little force should be required to install the stop. Changing a cable has never been easier! Adjustable Braking System. This feature allows you to adjust the braking system for your personal preference. Now you have the control over the brake. It also can be adjusted tighter or looser to account for wear on your taper.

name: TapeTech Basic Taping Set TTBTS
full_description: TapeTech Basic Taping Set TTBTS Pre-packaged Taping Set gives the drywall professional or remodeler everything necessary to string tape and complete first coat finish on corners. TapeTech drywall tools for taping and complete finishing of drywall corners, flats and butt joints. TapeTech Taping Tools are known worldwide, and can be considered the most recognized drywall tools for automatic taping and finishing. Tape Tech Taping Tools by Ames offer a 5 year warranty against manufacturer defects. Functions: Applies tape and compound to wall, ceiling and corner joints Finishes joints on walls and ceilings 5 Year TapeTech Warranty Includes: EZ Clean™ Automatic Taper 07TT Corner Roller 15TTE 3" EZ Roll™ Adjustable Corner Finisher 48TT Loading Pump 76TT Gooseneck 85TT Corner Finisher Adaptor CFATT Fiberglass Support Handle FHTT

name: TapeTech 1" Premium Stainless Steel Joint Knife
full_description: TapeTech 1" Premium Stainless Steel Joint Knife TapeTech Premium Taping and Jointing Knives feature the optimal combination of design, materials experience and testing to produce knives with the best balance, flex, comfort, and control so you achieve premium results when applying and smoothing joint compound. The handle’s over-sized, tapered shape provides the most ergonomic, slip-resistant grip. The enlarged, alloy hammer end allows it to be used to set protruding fasteners, adjust installation flaws, and protect against damage if the knife is dropped. TapeTech Premium Taping and Joint Knife blades are precision ground and polished to provide the perfect amount of flex and finish. The Carbon Steel and Blue Steel blades provide ultimate feel while Stainless Steel blades maximize rust resistance. TapeTech Premium Taping Knives feature the strongest backing plate in the industry, preventing unwanted blade deflection while providing smooth, consistent control and finish. name: TapeTech 2" Angle Head 40XTT
full_description: TapeTech 2" Angle Head Used to perfectly feather both sides of internal drywall tape corners in one pass. The corner finisher, also known as corner finisher, angle finisher, or glazer, is attached to a corner applicator, angle box, MudRunner® or angle head handle to quickly and professionally finish internal drywall corners. An angle head can be used for any 90º inside drywall corner, at either wall or ceiling junctions, and embeds inside angle tape on walls and ceilings by smoothly feathering excess mud in internal corners. TapeTech Corner Finishers are spring loaded to help compensate for slight corner imperfections. The TapeTech 2" corner finisher angle head is ideal for tape coats and for finishing drywall projects with narrow door legs or window trim areas. Stainless steel frames provide many years of reliable service and positive ball retainer keeps angle head securely attached to angle box, Mudrunner or angle head handle, eliminating surprise disconnects or tool damage. Locking Clip Retainer Eliminates Damaging Disconnects. Perfect For Glazing Tape Coat Narrow Side Legs Welded Steel Frames Durable Nickel-Plating Die-cast aluminum body resists corrosion

name: TapeTech 3" EasyRoll Angle Head 48TT
full_description: TapeTech 3" EasyRoll® Angle Head Reduces drag with easy rolling rubber-tired wheels. Used to perfectly feather both sides of internal drywall tape corners in one pass. Integrated spring adjusters allow quick change of spring tension to suit any drywall finishing job. 3" EasyRoll angle head can also be attached to angle box, corner box or Mudrunner to apply final smooth feathered finish to inside drywall corner angles. Tape Tech Easy Roll 3" corner finishing tool glides smoothly in drywall corners due to reduced friction. Use angle head to feather inside 90 degree tape corners after applying with banjo, compound applicator or automatic taper. EasyRoll angle corner finisher can also be used to apply final smooth feathered finish coat of compound, by simply attaching to an angle box (also known as flusher box, hockey box or corner applicator). Convenient spring adjustment levers quickly allow change of tension preference. Firm spring adjustment is often used when final finishing inside drywall angles, and softer setting is popular when applying tape coat. The 3" EasyRoll corner finisher can be used both for applying tape as well as smooth skimming finish compound to inside 90 degree drywall angle corners. Convenient Spring Tension Levers Locking Clip Retainer Eliminates Damaging Disconnects EasyRoll Wheels With Rubber Tires Reduce Friction Evenly finishes Both Sides Of Inside 90 degree angles 5-Year Manufacturer's Warranty

Features: 7 Position Rotating Head For Optimal Positioning of the Finishing Box Extends From 34" to 60" (86cm to 152cm) Attaches To All TapeTech And Most Other Brand Of Finishing Boxes Oversized Easy to Grip Star Knob Easy to Clean Fiberglass Construction Optimal Diameter For Gripping Dimensions: Length - 39.5" Height - 5.25" Width - 3.5" Weight - 2.75lbs

name: TapeTech 2" Inside Corner Compound Roller with Frame
full_description: TapeTech 2" Premium Inside Corner Compound Roller with Frame TapeTech drywall joint compound rollers are ideal for applying large amounts of drywall compound on walls and ceilings for finishing large patches and butt joints, or skimming entire walls, ceilings and rooms. They are a great alternative to breaking out a sprayer or trying to apply the compound with knives or trowels. Simply apply the joint compound with the TapeTech premium drywall joint compound roller and then skim the area with a TapeTech premium finishing knife for an amazing finish. The 2" compound roller is perfect for applying joint compound to internal corners prior to using a corner flusher or finisher. This roller includes a specially designed extended roller frame; the roller is not replaceable. Key Features: Highest Quality: TapeTech premium drywall joint compound rollers are manufactured in Europe exclusively for TapeTech, using the highest quality reticulated polypropylene nap for great results and long life. Highest Capacity : TapeTech premium drywall joint compound rollers feature an 18mm nap - nearly 50% thicker than other brands with ½” nap – allowing you to apply nearly 50% more compound to the surface between fills compared to other high nap rollers. Highest Coverage: The unique design and manufacturing of TapeTech premium joint compound rollers releases more compound from the nap and onto the surface, providing the highest coverage rate per roller load. Robust Frame Design: TapeTech premium drywall joint compound rollers are designed for use with TapeTech roller frames. Our frames are a full 5/16” thick – stronger than smaller ¼” thick frames on the market. Comfortable Handle: The TapeTech Roller frames feature a comfortable, two-component over molded handle that provides comfortable handling and positive grip, even when wet. Ideal for Skimming: The TapeTech premium drywall joint compound rollers are ideal for quickly applying large amounts of compound over patches, butt joints or entire surfaces. The perfect set up for skimming with TapeTech premium finishing knives.

name: TapeTech Compound Roller Support Handle 44" - 79" (2m)
full_description: TapeTech Compound Roller Support Handle 44" - 79" (2m) CROLLHAN2 TapeTech drywall joint compound rollers are ideal for applying large amounts of drywall compound on walls and ceilings for finishing large patches and butt joints, or skimming entire walls, ceilings and rooms. They are a great alternative to breaking out a sprayer or trying to apply the compound with knives or trowels. Simply apply the joint compound with the TapeTech premium drywall joint compound roller and then skim the area with a TapeTech premium finishing knife for an amazing finish. TapeTech compound rollers are designed for use with TapeTech roller frames. The shafts of our dedicated roller frames are a full 5/16” thick, providing the strongest frame in the industry – a must for this heavy-duty application. The roller and roller frames quickly and easily attach to our TapeTech model CROLLHAN2 extendable support handle (44” – 79”) to make quick work of most walls and ceilings without the need for stilts or scaffolds. Key Features: Ideal Length: The TapeTech CROLLHAN2 Support Handle for TapeTech premium drywall joint compound rollers extends from 44” – 79”, the most versatile range of extension handles for compound rollers. Robust but Lightweight: You don’t want unnecessary weight when you have a roller full of joint compound. The TapeTech CROLLHAN2 is the perfect balance of light weight and robust materials to make you as efficient as possible. Twist and Go: Our simple twist-lock design allows you to quickly make adjustments on the fly, without worrying about mechanical extension failures taking you and your project down. Lock and Load: Our CROLLHAN2 Support Handle quickly attaches to our range of four premium drywall joint compound roller frames and rollers. Frames and rollers are available in 2-inch, 4-inch, 9-inch and 12-inch. Stores Easily: CROLLHAN2 features a hanger at the end of the handle so you can easily hang the handle in your shop, vehicle or on the jobsite, keeping it from constantly falling to the floor when not in use.

name: TapeTech MudRunner® Pro
full_description: TapeTech MudRunner® Pro MR01TT The new second generation MudRunner® Pro tool applies joint compound to inside and outside corners faster and with precision control and minimal effort. The new MudRunner® Pro offers a tremendous update in the efficiency of finishing corners in drywall. The tool offers more versatility when needed in adjustment to length, both integrated and with the MRX01TT extension (sold separately). The new MudRunner® Pro also offers a 20% increase in piston strength for greater compound application. Adjustable Length: 52.5" - 60.5" Use With Any Inside Or Outside Corner Finisher Thicker Mud Applies Effortlessly Clear Tube For Visible Mud Level Reduces Wear-and-Tear On Your Shoulders Requires A Pump/Filler To Fill Requires An Applicator Head To Apply/Finish

name: TapeTech MudRunner® Pro Extension
full_description: The new MudRunner® Pro Extension allows the user to add 12" length to the MR01TT to reach higher spaces. The MRX01TT simply attaches by inserting the extrusion piece into the receiving port on the MR01TT and securing the clamps. The MRX01TT also has a receiving port to add multiple extensions. The New MudRunner® Pro Extension adds up to 20% more overall length to the MudRunner® Pro when installed. Due to the installment process, the extension becomes the "on/off" twisting lever for the tool.

Compact yet powerful, the TapeTech 9-1 Multi-Tool is built for efficiency and reliability, making it an essential addition to every professional's toolkit. name: TapeTech 6.5" Carbon Steel Jab Saw
full_description: TapeTech 6.5" Carbon Steel Jab Saw The TapeTech 6.5" Carbon Steel Jab Saw is a heavy-duty cutting tool built for precision and durability. Ideal for professional contractors, the TapeTech jab saw is built for efficiency and reliability, delivering unmatched results in every cut. name: TapeTech Blue Steel Taping Knife Kit

name: TapeTech 4" Compound Roller with Frame
full_description: TapeTech 4" Premium Compound Roller with Frame CROLL04CG TapeTech drywall joint compound rollers are ideal for applying large amounts of drywall compound on walls and ceilings for finishing large patches and butt joints, or skimming entire walls, ceilings and rooms. They are a great alternative to breaking out a sprayer or trying to apply the compound with knives or trowels. Simply apply the joint compound with the TapeTech premium drywall joint compound roller and then skim the area with a TapeTech premium finishing knife for an amazing finish. Key Features: Highest Quality: TapeTech premium drywall joint compound rollers are manufactured in Europe exclusively for TapeTech, using the highest quality reticulated polypropylene nap for great results and long life. Highest Capacity: TapeTech premium drywall joint compound rollers feature an 18mm nap - nearly 50% thicker than other brands with ½” nap – allowing you to apply nearly 50% more compound to the surface between fills compared to other high nap rollers. Highest Coverage: The unique design and manufacturing of TapeTech premium joint compound rollers releases more compound from the nap and onto the surface, providing the highest coverage rate per roller load. Robust Frame Design: TapeTech premium drywall joint compound rollers are designed for use with TapeTech roller frames. Our frames are a full 5/16” thick – stronger than smaller ¼” thick frames on the market. Comfortable Handle: The TapeTech Roller frames feature a comfortable, two-component over molded handle that provides comfortable handling and positive grip, even when wet. Extended Reach: Easily reach most common walls and ceilings using the TapeTech CROLLHAN2 extendable handle. With super secure attachment and lightweight but robust construction, you’ll quickly knock out any wall coverage or skimming job. Ideal for Skimming: The TapeTech premium drywall joint compound rollers are ideal for quickly applying large amounts of compound over patches, butt joints or entire surfaces. The perfect set up for skimming with TapeTech premium finishing knives.

name: TapeTech Semi-Auto Taping Tool Kit
full_description: TapeTech Semi-Auto Taping Tool Kit This kit is designed to dramatically boost your taping and finishing productivity compared to traditional hand taping. These semi-automatic tools improve efficiency and consistency, while minimizing material waste—saving you both time and money on every job. The included TapeTech Compound Tube allows for smooth, even application of joint compound to flat seams and inside corners. Attach the flat and corner applicators to the tube for easy, controlled compound delivery. After applying compound, use the corner roller to bed the tape securely into drywall angles. Finish with the corner flusher to achieve a clean, feathered finish in inside corners. The complete kit comes packed in a durable, custom-fit carrying case—making it easy to transport, store, and protect your tools on any jobsite. Features: Boost efficiency and reduce material waste compared to hand taping. Compound tube enables precise and even compound application. All essential tools for each step of the taping process included in one convenient kit. Custom case protects your tools and simplifies transportation. Kit Includes: TapeTech 42" Compound Tube CT42TT TapeTech 2.5" Direct Flusher CF25TT TapeTech 3" Direct Flusher CF30TT TapeTech 90º Inside Mud Applicator Head 16TT90 TapeTech 90º Outside Mud Applicator Head 16TT TapeTech Corner Roller Head 15TTE TapeTech Extendable Support Handle XHTT TapeTech Fiberglass Support Handle FHTT TapeTech Handle Adapter CFA-TT TapeTech 46" Hard Utility Case

name: TapeTech Xtender Flat Box Handle 88TTE
full_description: TapeTech Xtender Flat Box Handle 88TTE Attaches to any of the TapeTech or major brand Finishing Boxes and provides control to cleanly sweep the boxes off the joint for a perfect finish.The TapeTech Xtender Handle is an updated version of the original Concorde Xtender Handle. TapeTech integrated the Brake Anywhere design, and eliminated wear issues related to the pinch brake system. Extendable from 41"- 63" Works with all Major Brand Finishing Boxes Handle is 1 1/4" in diameter Brake Anywhere Design

name: TapeTech Corner Roller 15TTE
full_description: TapeTech Corner Roller 15TTE The Corner Roller embeds drywall paper tape firmly into the corner, ideal for use immediately after applying joint tape to the internal corner with the Automatic Taper. In preparation for use with a corner finisher, the Corner Roller forces excess joint compound from behind the tape. Featuring a Stainless Steel rollers for durability and clean edges. For best results, Use with the Fiberglass Handle FHTT or the Extension Handle XHTT (sold separately). Features: Steel Rollers with Plastic Interior Provides Smooth Operation. Embeds Paper Tape Into 90º Internal Corner Joints On Walls and Ceilings. Lightweight and Fast Easy Clean Up

name: TapeTech EasyClean® Loading Pump 76TT
full_description: TapeTech EasyClean® Loading Pump - 76TT Fills automatic drywall tools with joint compound through optional Gooseneck and Box Filler Fitting. The TapeTech Taping Tools Pump works with all major brand attachments and automatic taping and finishing tools. This pump features an Easy Clean® quick release foot valve has a twist-lock design for removal without tools. New integrated gasket design provides a better seal and makes disposable paper gaskets obsolete. The new streamlined head design makes cylinder removal and cleaning a breeze. Specially designed to increase suction, the anodized tube is also light and durable. Requires Box Filler and/or Gooseneck for filling tools (sold separately). Features: Easy Clean® Quick Release Integrated Gasket Design. Easy Clean Up Quick Release Handle Pin Designed To Increase Suction. Anodized Tube For Durability. 14.9" Length
